acceptanceCriteria.outcome: A new visitor can register and start shopping in a single browser session
A coupon applied at checkout reduces the order total by exactly the published discount
A placed COD order is visible in the buyer's order history within 30 s
A product the buyer can browse via /products is also discoverable via /search within 30 s — proves the kafka product-event → search-index projection is live

rows.outcome: Predecessor chapter has published a coupon (state.json check)
rows.errorMessage: journey state missing required keys: couponCode, couponDiscountVnd — a previous chapter must run first
